message:
test(tui): markdown security + regression suite (br-3vwi.3.3)

Add 18 hostile-markdown security tests verifying safe terminal rendering:
- Script tags, event handlers, javascript: URLs (inert in terminal)
- Deeply nested markup (no stack overflow)
- Huge headings, tables (100 cols), extremely long lines (100k chars)
- Unclosed code fences, many backticks
- Zero-width chars, control chars, ANSI escapes, null bytes
- HTML entity injection, huge image alt text

Add 3 snapshot-style consistency tests:
- Heading produces styled spans
- Code fence preserves content
- List items contain text

Total: 45 tui_markdown tests (10 base + 17 GFM + 18 security)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
